description_long: This armchair features a bold, contemporary design with a wide, low seat and dramatically flared armrests that curve outward, creating a striking silhouette. The upholstery is a vibrant mustard yellow fabric with a subtle, fine-textured pattern, giving the chair a warm and inviting appearance. The backrest is gently curved and extends seamlessly from the seat, providing ergonomic support while maintaining a sleek profile. The armrests are integrated into the body of the chair, sloping outward and downward in a continuous flow. The chair stands on four short, blocky wooden legs, which contrast with the soft fabric and add stability. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame beneath the upholstery, with ample padding for comfort.
description: A modern, mustard yellow armchair with wide, outward-flaring armrests, a curved backrest, and short block wooden legs. The fabric has a fine, textured pattern and the design is both bold and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, curved backrest, and outward-flaring armrests with visible wooden legs.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the dramatic outward curve of the armrests and the seamless transition between the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous curve of the backrest and the full width of the chair's back.
description_view_3: Back-side angle emphasizing the depth of the seat and the pronounced outward flare of the armrests.
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, gently curved, seamless with seat, no visible tufting or separation
